title: A visit to a fire station
description: For each question, write the correct answer. Write one word for each gap.

content.text: Our class visited the local fire station yesterday morning. A firefighter showed us around and explained what happens when someone calls for help. We saw the equipment used (27) firefighters during emergencies, including helmets, hoses and special clothing. I was surprised (28) how heavy some of the equipment was. The firefighter told us that the team practises every day so that they can work quickly and safely. We were allowed to sit inside a fire engine, which was much larger (29) I had imagined. Later, he explained how important it is to stay calm (30) a fire starts. Before leaving, we asked questions about training and rescue work. The visit helped me understand more (31) the job and the risks involved. I think firefighters are respected (32) the community because their work is so important.
